params.name: window
params.description: Historical window of time to use as the basis for the forecast.

params.name: forecastWindow
params.description: Duration of time to forecast into the future.

params.name: aggregate
params.description: Field by which to aggregate results. Supports the same values as the Allocation API aggregate parameter.

params.name: accumulate
params.description: If true, sum the entire range into a single set.

items.docs: Returns a cost forecast for Kubernetes workloads based on historical allocation data, projecting future costs over the specified forecast window.
